summary: The diff implements REQ-55 by adding a StatsPanel component with four StatCard components (All Days Hours, This Week Hours, Today Hours, Today Minutes) to DayTracker.tsx. The implementation uses date-fns for date calculations, reads from the existing entries data prop, and uses useMemo for reactivity. The panel is styled with the teal/slate-green theme and uses a responsive 2-col/4-col grid. Overall, the implementation appears to satisfy all acceptance criteria.
